_note: THIS FILE IS NOT USED BY THE SITE. It is the simplified English base used for creating translations. The live English site uses en.json which has punchier copy.

drink.title:
Only the
Best.
drink.description: We offer a carefully selected and regularly changing range of craft beer — fourteen draught lines and over 200 cans and bottles. Enjoy here or take home. You choose.
drink.feature_1: 14 rotating draught lines — always something new
drink.feature_2: Around 200 cans and bottles from the UK and beyond
drink.feature_3: Always a good selection of alcohol-free and gluten-free beers
drink.feature_4: A small, carefully chosen selection of wine and spirits
drink.feature_5: Takeaway available from the bottle shop

food.title:
Fresh.
Gone fast.
food.description: Burgers, wings, chips. That is our focus. The menu is small but excellent — dry-aged beef, fried chicken sandwiches, real chips hand-cut and fried twice. Some dishes to share. Some to go with your next beer. Vegan options that are just as good.

book.title: Bookings
book.description: Booking is optional — we always keep half the space for walk-ins. If you want to be sure of a table, book below.
book.groups_text: Call us on +44 7400 653295. We cannot guarantee that several reserved tables will be next to each other — contact us and we will arrange it.
book.notice_text: Tables are held for 10 minutes — please call if you are running late. Garden seating is first come, first served and cannot be reserved.

location.title: Location & Hours
location.kitchen_note: Walk-ins only after the kitchen closes.

footer.tagline: Craft beer and burgers in Edinburgh's Old Town since 2016.

gift_cards.page_title: Give the Gift of Craft Beer
gift_cards.subtitle: Pick a value, tell us who it's for, and we'll take care of the rest.
gift_cards.expires_note: Gift cards are valid for 12 months from purchase.
gift_cards.error_amount: Please select an amount between £25 and £250
gift_cards.confirmation_sent: Confirmation and gift card sent to
gift_cards.for_me_desc: We'll email you a gift card you can print and hand over in person
gift_cards.for_friend_desc: We'll email the gift card directly to them
gift_cards.confirm_self_title: Your gift card is on its way
gift_cards.confirm_self_message: We've sent your gift card to
gift_cards.confirm_friend_message: We've sent a gift card to
gift_cards.confirm_friend_email: The gift card has been emailed to

gift_cards_success.title: Thank You!
gift_cards_success.subtitle: Your gift card has been created.
gift_cards_success.email_note: Check your email — your gift card is attached and ready to go.
gift_cards_success.processing_text: Your payment is being confirmed. You will receive an email with your gift card shortly.
